result.reason: Importing connections from MobaXterm enhances interoperability and user experience by allowing users to migrate existing connection configurations.
result.approach: Investigate the MobaXterm '.moba' file format to understand its structure. Develop a new deserializer class (e.g., MobaXtermDeserializer) that parses the '.moba' file content and converts it into mRemoteNG's internal connection object model. Create an importer class (e.g., MobaXtermImporter) to handle file selection and orchestrate the deserialization process. Integrate a new menu item into the main application UI (e.g., in the 'File -> Import' menu) to trigger the MobaXterm import functionality.
